response:
### Basic Salad Ingredients
- [ ]  Salad greens base (romaine, iceberg, or mixed baby greens)
- [ ]  Cherry tomatoes (halved)
- [ ]  Cucumber (sliced / diced)
- [ ]  Thinly sliced red onion
- [ ]  Diced bell pepper
- [ ]  Grated or julienned carrot
- [ ]  Olive oil (for dressing)
- [ ]  Vinegar (balsamic, apple cider or white wine)
- [ ]  Salt & fresh black pepper
- [ ]  Optional: Plain croutons
- [ ]  Optional: Shredded parmesan cheese
